query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) as total_lideres,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_departamento_liderado,
  SUM(CASE WHEN u.departamentoId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_departamento_como_colaborador,
  SUM(CASE WHEN u.leaderId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_lider_superior
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN departamentos d ON d.leaderId = u.id
WHERE u.role = 'lider';

  SUM(CASE WHEN u.departamentoId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_departamento_como_colaborador,
  SUM(CASE WHEN u.leaderId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_lider_superior
